name: Talkdesk AI-Powered Contact Center API
what_it_does: Talkdesk API for AI-powered cloud contact center platform. Enables AI agents to query call and interaction data, access real-time analytics, manage agents and routing, and leverage Talkdesk's built-in AI capabilities (sentiment analysis, summarization, agent assist). Talkdesk differentiates on AI-first contact center features.
use_cases: Querying interaction analytics and AI-generated summaries from CX reporting agents
Accessing agent performance data and coaching insights from workforce management agents
Retrieving call recordings and AI sentiment analysis from customer experience agents
Managing routing rules and AI-powered predictive routing from contact center automation agents
not_for: Small teams without enterprise contact center budgets
Simple phone routing without AI requirements
best_when: An enterprise using Talkdesk wants AI agents to leverage Talkdesk's AI-generated insights — combining external AI agents with Talkdesk's built-in CX AI for comprehensive contact center automation.
avoid_when: You don't have Talkdesk — enterprise CCaaS requires significant investment. PRIVACY: Customer call recordings and AI-generated summaries contain sensitive conversation data.

auth.notes: Talkdesk OAuth 2.0 client credentials. App registration via Talkdesk developer portal. Scoped access per API resource.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Enterprise contract required; contact Talkdesk sales
pricing.paid_tiers: Talkdesk CX Cloud tiers (Essentials, Elevate, Elite, Experience Clouds)
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing. API access included with Talkdesk subscription.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits documented per endpoint in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer interaction data, AI summaries, and recordings are sensitive
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Talkdesk AI features (sentiment, summaries) have separate API endpoints
Enterprise pricing makes integration only viable for existing Talkdesk customers
HIPAA BAA required for healthcare contact center data access
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer call data with AI-generated insights. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. Enterprise compliance posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer interaction and AI insight data. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. HIPAA BAA for healthcare.
